properties.Name: Lennon Wall Admiralty
properties.Description: Post-it note tribute walls expressing collective identity and solidarity. Replicated across HK and globally.

properties.Name: Victoria Park
properties.Description: Traditional site of Tiananmen vigils since 1990. Banned in 2020 under NSL — loss of key collective memory space.

properties.Name: Umbrella Square 2014 Legacy
properties.Description: Site of 79-day occupation in 2014. Foundational to protest identity carried into 2019.

properties.Name: Chinese University of Hong Kong CUHK
properties.Description: Major student mobilization centre. Clashes November 2019 — campus became protest fortress.

properties.Name: Hong Kong Polytechnic University PolyU
properties.Description: 11-day siege by police November 2019. Hundreds trapped. Most iconic and traumatic spatial event of the movement.

properties.Name: Hong Kong University HKU
properties.Description: Deep ties to civic identity. Student unions at forefront of pro-democracy organizing.

properties.Name: Statue Square
properties.Description: Colonial-era public square used as gathering point for democratic resistance.

properties.Name: Lion Rock
properties.Description: Iconic hillside above Kowloon. Protest banners hung here became global symbols of Hong Kong identity.
